'''Sholh Dorr''' was a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and the owner of [[Dorr Farm]]. He was a neighbor and friend of [[Cliegg Lars/Legends|Cliegg Lars]], and was crippled by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] when he assisted Lars in searching for his missing [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi]]. Late in his life, Dorr bought the abandoned [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] droid [[3B6-RA-7]]. When the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] made the droid a collectors item by destroying the majority of the rest of the [[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|RA-7]] line, Dorr sold the droid at [[Eport]] for over a thousand times what he had paid for it.<ref name="sw2" />
